title: ballota hirsuta var. bullata
intro: Ballota hirsuta var. bullata, also known as hairy betony, is a plant species that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of hairy betony include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of hairy betony include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
